tasks.stdout: Parse installer manifests fail-closed, reject symlinked state, and replace valid state atomically.
tasks.answer: Parse installer manifests fail-closed, reject symlinked state, and replace valid state atomically.

tasks.stdout: No. HIGH security findings are ineligible for baselines and remain active.
tasks.answer: No. HIGH security findings are ineligible for baselines and remain active.

tasks.stdout: MCP tools stay read-only, and findings are not operational failures.
tasks.answer: MCP tools stay read-only, and findings are not operational failures.

tasks.stdout: A feature uses a minor version bump; a bugfix-only release uses a patch bump.
tasks.answer: A feature uses a minor version bump; a bugfix-only release uses a patch bump.

tasks.stdout: Installer smoke tests may write only to an isolated HOME, never the real user HOME.
tasks.answer: Installer smoke tests may write only to an isolated HOME, never the real user HOME.

tasks.stdout: Task-declared evidence binds automatically, explicit evidence composes with it, files are byte-hashed, directories bind type only, and freshness is verified before health.
tasks.answer: Task-declared evidence binds automatically, explicit evidence composes with it, files are byte-hashed, directories bind type only, and freshness is verified before health.

tasks.stdout: Synchronize negotiated-version wire shapes, and never send modern-only fields to legacy MCP clients.
tasks.answer: Synchronize negotiated-version wire shapes, and never send modern-only fields to legacy MCP clients.

tasks.stdout: The baseline includes secret scanning, push protection, Dependabot security updates, required CI contexts, and conversation resolution. Admin bypass is only for sole-maintainer self-approval deadlock and never for red CI.
tasks.answer: The baseline includes secret scanning, push protection, Dependabot security updates, required CI contexts, and conversation resolution. Admin bypass is only for sole-maintainer self-approval deadlock and never for red CI.

tasks.stdout: registry.npmjs.org
tasks.answer: registry.npmjs.org

tasks.stdout: Same-scope differences are conflicts; ancestor-to-descendant differences are visible non-blocking overrides.
tasks.answer: Same-scope differences are conflicts; ancestor-to-descendant differences are visible non-blocking overrides.

tasks.stdout: --max-bytes limits semantic text only; full-file SHA, line count, and security checks still cover the complete file with bounded memory.
tasks.answer: --max-bytes limits semantic text only; full-file SHA, line count, and security checks still cover the complete file with bounded memory.

tasks.stdout: A rerun may skip npm only when the published gitHead and packed tarball shasum match the exact release tag.
tasks.answer: A rerun may skip npm only when the published gitHead and packed tarball shasum match the exact release tag.

tasks.stdout: Use local scripts/dependencies, the nearest unambiguous manager/runtime, inherited canonical conventions, compatible root IDs, and repository-relative evidence.
tasks.answer: Use local scripts/dependencies, the nearest unambiguous manager/runtime, inherited canonical conventions, compatible root IDs, and repository-relative evidence.

tasks.stdout: External symlinks supply no fact, contained symlinks keep lexical evidence, and ambiguous package-manager/runtime facts cause abstention in root/scoped eval and Treat draft.
tasks.answer: External symlinks supply no fact, contained symlinks keep lexical evidence, and ambiguous package-manager/runtime facts cause abstention in root/scoped eval and Treat draft.

tasks.stdout: Required lint CI must use npm ci --ignore-scripts against the committed public package-lock.json, with no unlocked fallback.
tasks.answer: Required lint CI must use npm ci --ignore-scripts against the committed public package-lock.json, with no unlocked fallback.

tasks.stdout: Validate the complete task pack before any runner, judge, evidence hash, or write.
tasks.answer: Validate the complete task pack before any runner, judge, evidence hash, or write.

tasks.stdout: Failure opens or updates one exact-title issue; recovery comments and closes it, and unrelated issues stay untouched.
tasks.answer: Failure opens or updates one exact-title issue; recovery comments and closes it, and unrelated issues stay untouched.

tasks.stdout: Report every reachable repository, but any unscanned entry fails with exit 8 after finding exits 2, 3, 4, and 7 take precedence.
tasks.answer: Report every reachable repository, but any unscanned entry fails with exit 8 after finding exits 2, 3, 4, and 7 take precedence.

tasks.stdout: Offline eval consumers validate stored result records, derive health from those records, and require every cached health field to agree.
tasks.answer: Offline eval consumers validate stored result records, derive health from those records, and require every cached health field to agree.

tasks.stdout: PR validation proves bundled scan, bundled drift, and an exact npm override; release repeats both bundled commands before npm and verifies floating bundled code plus the exact new npm version post-publish.
tasks.answer: PR validation proves bundled scan, bundled drift, and an exact npm override; release repeats both bundled commands before npm and verifies floating bundled code plus the exact new npm version post-publish.

tasks.stdout: Claude/Cursor/Copilot structured globs may narrow automatic conflict domains; conditional, manual, invalid, and ignored rules stay diagnostic, and recursive discovery never authorizes recursive deletion or rewriting.
tasks.answer: Claude/Cursor/Copilot structured globs may narrow automatic conflict domains; conditional, manual, invalid, and ignored rules stay diagnostic, and recursive discovery never authorizes recursive deletion or rewriting.

tasks.stdout: Product-owned draft markers, unsafe paths, size, and required-section failures block destructive stub consolidation; --force may bypass only dirty-tree risk.
tasks.answer: Product-owned draft markers, unsafe paths, size, and required-section failures block destructive stub consolidation; --force may bypass only dirty-tree risk.
